title: EXPRESSION OF INTEREST (EOI) No. 26-606, “Multilevel Overhaul and Modernization”
description: Notice is hereby given that New Jersey Transit (NJ TRANSIT) is issuing an Expression of Interest (EOI) to identify qualified firms that have the capability and experience to overhaul and modernize four hundred twenty-nine (429) Multilevel rail cars. Respondents should have experience in overhauling commuter railcars, are eligible as an FTA Transit Vehicle Manufacturers (TVM), and have experience in meeting all applicable Federal Rail Administration (FRA), American Association of Railroads (AAR), and American Public Transportation Association (APTA) requirements and standards with 10 years’ overhaul experience in the North American market with similar rail cars. Firms that have met the minimum requirements of this EOI may be placed on a short list to be invited to participate in a future solicitation for this project. Firms must demonstrate having familiarity with past project experience and understanding of all the critical items. Interested firms should submit their EOI response no later than 3:00 P. M. ET, January 30, 2026. For a complete EOI package, inquiries and requests for information, kindly contact William Caruso, Senior Procurement Analyst, by email at wcaruso@njtransit.com.

title: SOURCES SOUGHT NOTICE (SSN) No. 26-012S “LiDAR Hardware and Perception Software Evaluation PoC”
description: The purpose of this Sources Sought Notice (SSN) is to identify vendors that meet the requirements of the services sought by NJ TRANSIT described herein. NJ TRANSIT is seeking vendors with expertise in evaluating LiDAR sensors and perception software solutions in transportation, or public safety environments. Capabilities include but are not limited to accurate monitoring, detection, flexible integration and analysis of passenger flows, safety events, and station activity in dense operational environments. As part of market research, NJ TRANSIT is issuing this SSN to determine if there exists an adequate number of qualified interested vendors that are capable of fulfilling these requirements. Please send responses with the subject heading: SSN No. 26-012S “LiDAR Hardware and Perception Software Evaluation PoC” to SourcesSought@njtransit.com in order to receive additional information.

title: BL26-7 - One (1) decommissioned Bus (2018 MCI/D4500 Bus 18043)
description: Up for auction is one (1) decommissioned Bus (2018 MCI/D4500 Bus 18043). This bus is not in driving condition and are sold in “AS IS” “WHERE IS” condition. Bus is located at 442 Avenue P, Newark NJ 07105. Towing will be required to remove them from the property. No prep-work, mechanical or otherwise, except for tow purposes, will be allowed. Purchase price does NOT include tires, though they can be purchased separately. A certified check for $2,000.90 is required for the tires at the time of the initial bus pickup. The check will be returned when the tires are returned. New Jersey Transit makes no warranty, guarantee or representation of any kind, expressed or implied, as to the merchantability or fitness for any purpose of the property offered for sale. For additional information, please contact Natasha Camargo at ncamargo@njtransit.com or via phone at 973-491-8185.
